uplink._note: Raw fields cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js decodeUplink: status=1, battery=3.6, temperatureBoard=20, time=4, count=96476. detected=(status>0). boardTemperature kept as an extra (internal board sensor, not ambient air). timeSinceLastEvent is upstream's `time` (seconds since last event). count = cumulative motion-event total.
Synthetic in-bounds payload, oracle from reference/upstream-codec.js: status=0, battery=3.5, temperatureBoard=18, time=30, count=200. Exercises action.motion.detected=false.
Upstream returns {errors:['unknown FPort']} for any non-102 FPort on a non-empty payload.
Upstream returns a bare {} here; our contract forbids that, so we report an error instead.
